title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission grant flow during onboarding does not present Android-standard Allow Once/While Using/Don't Allow options when enabling Find My Device from Poly Lens menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
4. Reach the 'Organized' screen in the onboarding flow.
6. Tap 'Don't Allow' when the location permission dialog appears.
8. Log in or tap 'Continue as Guest' to complete onboarding.
9. Open the Poly Lens menu by tapping the hamburger icon (☰).
11. Tap 'Enable Now' on the Find My Device screen.
12. Grant the Location permission by selecting 'While Using the App' (or 'Allow Once' / 'While Using' depending on Android version).
13. Return to the Poly Lens app.
expected: The app displays the Android location permission dialog with appropriate options (Allow Once, While Using the App, Don't Allow). After granting permission, the user is returned to the Find My Device screen within the Poly Lens app, and the feature is enabled.
